hero.subtitle: PrimeFx Invest is a secure international platform for portfolio management, transparent fees, and institutional-grade investor tools.

whyChoose.title: Why Thousands Choose Us
whyChoose.subtitle: Technology, security, and clear reporting — designed for investors who expect institutional standards.

features.title: AI-Powered Edge
features.description: Our tools analyze global markets to support informed investment decisions. Performance may vary with market conditions.

features.title: Diverse Opportunities
features.description: Access forex, commodities, indices, and digital assets across 150+ countries — all from one unified platform.

features.title: Bank-Level Security
features.description: 256-bit SSL encryption, cold storage, and multi-factor authentication keep your funds and data fully protected.

features.title: Expert Management
features.description: Experienced analysts and portfolio tools work alongside you — with full visibility into fees, payouts, and performance.

features.title: Transparent & Fair
features.description: No hidden fees, no surprises. Real-time portfolio tracking and detailed reports so you always know where you stand.

features.title: 24/7 Human Support
features.description: Our dedicated support team is available around the clock via live chat, email, and phone whenever you need help.

steps.title: Create Account

steps.description: Pick from Starter, Growth, Prime, or Elite based on your goals.

steps.description: Deposit via supported crypto methods. Funds are credited after blockchain verification.

steps.title: Portfolio Management

steps.description: Monitor performance, fees, and payout schedules. Withdraw on your schedule.

items.quote: The dashboard gives me clear visibility into my portfolio, fees, and payout schedule. Support responded quickly when I had questions about verification.
items.name: Sarah Mitchell

items.quote: I appreciate the transparent fee breakdown and transaction history. The platform feels professional and easy to navigate on mobile.
items.name: James Okafor

items.quote: Security features like 2FA and clear withdrawal status gave me confidence. I can track everything without guesswork.
items.name: Elena Rodriguez

faq.title: Häufig gestellte Fragen
faq.subtitle: Alles, was Sie vor dem Start wissen müssen.

items.question: Is PrimeAI Invest safe and secure?
items.answer: Yes. We use 256-bit SSL encryption, cold storage wallets, two-factor authentication, and are fully compliant with global financial regulations.

items.question: What is the minimum investment amount?
items.answer: You can start with as little as $50 on our Starter Plan. Higher-tier plans have higher minimums. Investment performance may vary.

items.question: How often can I withdraw my profits?
items.answer: Withdrawals are processed every 7 days on all plans. You can also access your capital anytime with no lock-in periods.

items.question: How does the AI investment system work?
items.answer: Our tools analyze market data to support portfolio decisions. Performance depends on market conditions and your selected plan. PrimeAI provides informational guidance only.

items.question: What returns can I realistically expect?
items.answer: Returns vary by plan and market conditions. Weekly target returns range from 3% on the Starter Plan to 5% on the Elite Plan. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

items.question: Do I need investment experience to get started?
items.answer: Not at all. PrimeFx Invest is designed for everyone — from complete beginners to seasoned investors. Our platform handles everything for you.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept bank transfers, credit/debit cards, and major cryptocurrencies including Bitcoin and Ethereum.

items.question: Is there a mobile app available?
items.answer: Yes! Our mobile app is available on both iOS and Android, giving you full access to your portfolio, deposits, withdrawals, and support on the go.

faq.a1: KYC abschließen, Wallet aufladen, Anlageplan wählen und Renditen im Dashboard verfolgen.
faq.a2: Mindestbeträge variieren je nach Plan. Starter ab 50 $.
faq.a3: Gehen Sie zu Profil → Verifizierung und schließen Sie KYC ab. Meist in 24–48 Stunden.
faq.a4: PrimeFx erhebt eine feste Gebühr von 1,20 $ für interne Überweisungen zwischen PrimeFx Invest-Konten. Weitere Gebühren hängen vom Transaktionstyp ab.
faq.a5: Krypto-Auszahlungen über NOWPayments werden nach Freigabe meist innerhalb weniger Stunden bearbeitet.
faq.a6: Verdienen Sie Belohnungen durch Erfolge, Empfehlungen und höhere Ränge im Rewards Center.
faq.a7: Teilen Sie Ihren Link unter Empfehlen & Verdienen. Provisionen bei Einzahlungen und Investitionen Ihrer Empfohlenen.
faq.a8: Gehen Sie zu Wallet → Einzahlung, Betrag eingeben und über NOWPayments bezahlen. Gutschrift nach Bestätigung.

withdraw.description: Krypto-Auszahlungen werden über NOWPayments Massenauszahlungen verarbeitet.
withdraw.invalidAmount: Geben Sie einen gültigen Auszahlungsbetrag ein.
withdraw.refreshCurrenciesHint: Standard-Krypto-Optionen werden verwendet. Versuchen Sie es erneut, falls die Auszahlung fehlschlägt.
withdraw.submittedDesc: Ihre Auszahlung wird von NOWPayments verarbeitet.

invest.title: Invest
invest.subtitle: Compare plans, pick one that matches your goals, and invest from your wallet.
invest.sectionSubtitle: Weekly returns, minimums, and payout schedule — select a plan then invest

empty.title: No investment plans
empty.description: Plans will appear here once they are configured in your account.

card.performanceDisclaimer: Target return. Actual performance may vary.

errors.insufficientBalance: Insufficient wallet balance. Please deposit funds first.

recommendation.title: Not sure which plan is right for you?
recommendation.description: Let PrimeAI help you compare plans based on your profile and goals. Recommendations are informational only.

howItWorks.title: How investing works
howItWorks.description: Pick a plan below, fund your wallet, and profits are distributed weekly. Capital can be withdrawn with a short notice period.

primeAiWidget.title: PrimeAI Assistant
primeAiWidget.greeting: How can I help you today?

emailVerification.bannerTitle: Verify your email address to secure your account and unlock all features.
emailVerification.bannerDescription: Check your inbox for the verification link, or resend the email below.
emailVerification.resendSuccess: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.
emailVerification.modalDescription: Please verify your email address before using this feature.
emailVerification.sectionDescription: Manage your account email and verification status.
emailVerification.changeEmailDescription: We will send a confirmation link to your new email address.
emailVerification.changeEmailInvalid: Enter a valid email address different from your current one.
emailVerification.changeEmailSuccess: Confirmation email sent to your new address.

assistance.title: PrimeFx Assistance
assistance.subtitle: AI Powered Support • Online 24/7
assistance.welcomeMessage:
Hi! I'm PrimeFx Assistance, your AI support specialist. I can help with deposits, withdrawals, investments, verification, referrals, security, and more.

I have access to your account context, so ask me anything — for example: "What's the status of my withdrawal?"
assistance.unavailable: PrimeFx Assistance is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
assistance.infrastructureMissing: Support chat is being set up. Please try again shortly or email support.
assistance.requestFailed: Could not send your message. Please try again.
assistance.resolved: Glad we could help! Chat marked as resolved.

home.subtitle: AI-first support with instant answers. Escalate to a specialist anytime.
home.resumeChatDesc: Pick up where you left off with PrimeFx Assistance
home.humanEscalationDesc: AI couldn't solve it? Connect with a human specialist.
home.humanEscalationQuery: I'd like to speak with a support specialist please.

help.noResultsDesc: Try different keywords or ask our AI assistant.
help.fallbackQuery: I need help finding information in the help center.

quickActionQueries.depositHelp: I need help with making a deposit. What are the steps and available payment methods?
quickActionQueries.withdrawalHelp: I need help with a withdrawal. Can you check my pending withdrawals and explain the process?
quickActionQueries.verifyIdentity: I need help with identity verification (KYC). What is my current status and what should I do next?
quickActionQueries.investmentHelp: I need help understanding investment plans and how to invest on PrimeFx.
quickActionQueries.referralHelp: I have questions about the referral program, my rank, and commissions.
quickActionQueries.securityHelp: I have a security concern or need help with account protection and 2FA.

escalation.title: Need more help?
escalation.checkedContext: Checked account context and withdrawal queue
escalation.failed: Could not escalate. Please try again or email support.
escalation.connected: You are now connected to a PrimeFx Support Specialist.
escalation.waiting: A support specialist will respond shortly. Your conversation history has been shared with our team.
